description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized, muscular male figure in a dramatic, forward-leaning pose, with one arm extended downward and the other bent at the elbow. The figure's head is slightly bowed, and the body is rendered with detailed anatomical features, including defined muscles and visible veins. The surface has a weathered, greenish patina typical of aged bronze, giving it a classical and somber appearance. The figure stands on an irregular, rocky base that appears to be part of the same material as the body. The overall impression is one of movement and emotional weight, as if the figure is burdened or in deep contemplation. The sculpture is evocative of works by Auguste Rodin, with expressive form and textured surface.
description: A life-sized, muscular male figure in a dramatic, forward-leaning pose with a weathered green patina, standing on a rocky base. The sculpture is highly detailed and expressive, evoking a sense of movement and emotional depth.
description_view_0: The left side of the sculpture shows the figure's muscular torso, bent forward with the left arm extended and the right arm bent, highlighting the dynamic posture.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the bowed head, detailed chest, and the expressive downward reach of the left arm, emphasizing the figure's emotional weight.
description_view_2: The right side displays the curvature of the back, the extended left arm, and the bent right leg, accentuating the anatomical detail and movement.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the muscular back, the figure's stance on the rocky base, and the overall mass and volume of the sculpture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
